name: termweave

scripts.build: bun run config:sync && bun run check && vite build
scripts.tauri: bun run icons:generate && bun run config:sync && tauri
scripts.app:check: bun run check && bun run --cwd sidecar check && bun run format && bun run --cwd sidecar format
scripts.app:dev: bun run app:check && bun run icons:generate && bun run config:sync && bun run sidecar:build && tauri dev
scripts.app:build: bun run app:check && bun run icons:generate && bun run config:sync && bun run sidecar:build && tauri build

description: A config-driven Tauri and OpenTUI starter for native desktop terminal apps.
